steps: Go to https://console.groq.com and sign up or log in
Click 'API Keys' in the left sidebar, or go directly to https://console.groq.com/keys
Enter a display name for the key
Copy the API key immediately — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Groq API key, sent as 'Bearer <key>' in the Authorization header

notes: Free tier available with generous rate limits for development and prototyping
API key is shown only once at creation — store it securely
Only team owners or users with the 'developer' role can create API keys
OpenAI-compatible API — drop-in replacement by changing base URL and API key

test_endpoint.description: List available models to verify the API key is valid
